title: BEM-1148 lifecycle runner
objective:
Create file governance/runners/contour_lifecycle_runner.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

SCHEMA_PATH = Path("governance/contours/contour_lifecycle_schema.json")


def load_schema():
    return json.loads(SCHEMA_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def allowed_transition(current_state, next_state):
    schema = load_schema()
    transitions = {tuple(item) for item in schema.get("required_transitions", [])}
    return (current_state, next_state) in transitions


def advance(state_doc, next_state, proof=None):
    current = state_doc.get("state")
    if not allowed_transition(current, next_state):
        return {"ok": False, "error": f"transition not allowed: {current}->{next_state}"}
    if next_state == "completed" and not proof:
        return {"ok": False, "error": "proof required for completed"}
    updated = dict(state_doc)
    updated["state"] = next_state
    if proof:
        updated["proof"] = proof
    return {"ok": True, "state": updated}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    if len(sys.argv) != 4:
        print("usage: contour_lifecycle_runner.py <state.json> <next_state> <proof_or_dash>")
        raise SystemExit(2)
    state = json.loads(Path(sys.argv[1]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    proof = None if sys.argv[3] == "-" else sys.argv[3]
    result = advance(state, sys.argv[2], proof)
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
